title: Daizen Maeda
body: Daizen Maeda (前田 大然, Maeda Daizen; born 20 October 1997) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a forward for Scottish Premiership side Celtic and the Japan national team.
categories: All articles covered by WikiProject Wikify
